programme.title: Taxi No 9211
programme.desc: A taxi driver and a spoiled rich man's lives collide, changing both forever in one day.

programme.title: Mission Istaanbul
programme.desc: An action thriller film that follows the story of a journalist, Vikas, who is sent to Istanbul to cover a breaking news story. However, he becomes embroiled in a dangerous conspiracy involving international terrorism and political corruption. The movie features high-octane action sequences and explores themes of courage, patriotism, and the importance of journalistic integrity in a thrilling and suspenseful plot.

programme.title: Pyare Mohan
programme.desc: A blind man Pyare and his deaf friend Mohan fall in love with twin sisters Preeti and Priya. But their relationships spiral into chaos when the sisters get falsely implicated in a murder case and the men have to find a way to save them.

programme.title: Bollywood Movie
programme.desc: The Movie Club provides Bollywood films, popular Indian movies, and general entertainment programming.
